name: Mickey Soderberg Golf Lessons
about: Mickey Soderberg Golf Lessons is a premier golf instruction and training facility operating in the Minneapolis-St. Paul area. The business specializes in year-round, personalized golf coaching through both indoor simulator sessions and outdoor lessons at various locations. Instruction focuses on a structured improvement process, utilizing advanced launch monitor technology and video analysis to help students achieve their golfing goals. Lessons are available for all skill levels, from beginners to advanced players, with a strong emphasis on customization and measurable results. The facility operates seasonally with specific indoor simulator locations available during off-season months and outdoor courses open when weather permits.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level data from Trackman and GolfZon simulators for precise shot analysis
Personalized improvement plans with a structured, goal-oriented teaching methodology
Video-based instruction via CoachNow platform for easy review and retention
Multiple locations for flexible indoor and outdoor lesson scheduling

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor at The Cages Burnsville location
Available at Element Golf Vadnais Heights location

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the service doesn't explicitly state club rentals, it's highly recommended that students bring their own clubs for personalized fitting and instruction.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services available at the facility, so bringing your own may be permitted but should be confirmed directly.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, a standard golf lesson typically lasts 1 hour, and this is the time block available through the booking system.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers instruction for all ages and skill levels, including juniors and youth programs, making it suitable for families.
